title: Microsoft Teams/Monday Integration Trouble Shoot
excerpt:

Last month I added the Monday.com app to my Microsoft Teams environment. It was working very well, notifying me via a teams chat alert whenever I received a Monday notification. This was a very helpful feature fo…

posts.author: Sarahmorris792 (Sarah Morris)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Last month I added the Monday.com app to my Microsoft Teams environment. It was working very well, notifying me via a teams chat alert whenever I received a Monday notification. This was a very helpful feature for our organization. This feature stopped working suddenly on January 1st. I no longer get a notification in Teams regarding Monday. I have tried setting up notifications on new boards, logging in and out etc.

Any advice on how to resolve?

posts.author: robgibbs (Rob Gibbs)
posts.cookedHtml: I just joined and am having the same issue…except it never worked for me…any update on this from the Monday Team? I’ve opened 2 tix (second one kinda on accident…sorry) on this and can’t get anyone to respond to either of them.

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Sarahmorris792, thanks for posting about this!

I worked with you via email support and it sounds like the chat alert is working for you now (let me know if I’ve got that wrong!)

@robgibbs, has the issue been resolved for you as well? Feel free to private message me if not, and we can figure it out from there!

posts.author: robgibbs (Rob Gibbs)
posts.cookedHtml:
It seems to be. Thank you for your help!
Rob

posts.author: Sarahmorris792 (Sarah Morris)
posts.cookedHtml: it is working for me now, thank you!

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @robgibbs and @Sarahmorris792, awesome! Glad to hear it

posts.author: troczen (Marlon)
posts.cookedHtml:
@TRB-monday.com Monday Teams Meeting Extension Not Showing Up. We have followed the Knowledgebase and have had no success in setting it up.
I have the Board added to the tab, meeting starts, Have the integration appearing to be fine, no Monday icon in the meeting app though. Any help much appreciated.
